headline: Etsy (ETSY) Gets UK Clearance To Sell Depop To eBay
summary: UK Competition and Markets Authority clears eBay’s acquisition of Depop from Etsy (NYSE:ETSY). Approval allows Etsy to move ahead with the divestment of Depop to eBay. Decision signals a shift in Etsy’s business mix and potential future capital deployment. Etsy runs a global marketplace focused on unique and handcrafted goods, sitting alongside larger generalist platforms and niche resale apps. The UK approval for transferring Depop to eBay comes as online commerce continues to evolve...

headline: Etsy vs. Wayfair: Which Consumer Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: Etsy maintains profitability with a 5.7% net margin, while Wayfair is still unprofitable despite 5.1% revenue growth.
